mapper.select: SELECT a.id,a.title,a.neirong,a.time,a.state,a.description,t.tag,a.image FROM article a LEFT JOIN tag t ON a.tag = t.id WHERE a.state = 2
SELECT a.id,a.title,a.neirong,a.time,a.state,a.description,t.tag,a.image FROM article a LEFT JOIN tag t ON a.tag = t.id WHERE a.state = 2
mapper.update: update oldcat.article set state = "0" where id = #{id}
